ham: Namaste, aapke mutual fund SIP deduction ₹10,000 XYZ Fund ke liye 15th May ko aapke account se debit hoga. Agar aap amount change karna chahte hain ya SIP stop karna chahte hain, to 24 hours ke andar STOP reply kare ya aapke bank se contact kare. Dhanyavaad.
spam: Hey! 🚀 Tere 5G plan ko FREE upgrade mil gaya! 30 din ke liye unlimited data, bina extra charges ke. Bas <URL> click karke activate kar. Jaldi kar, offer abhi khatam ho raha hai! Limited slots. YES reply karke confirm kar.
